title: Zootropolis runtime configuration
description: Read by scripts/dev.sh at server boot and exposed to Paperclip as environment variables. Each field maps to one ZOOTROPOLIS_* env var; env vars already set in the shell win over the file, so you can still override per-run.

strict.description: Enforce strict parent↔child issue assignment and per-agent issue visibility. Maps to ZOOTROPOLIS_DELEGATION_STRICT.

useReal.description: Wire the real AliasKit API for identity provisioning. Default false = mock identities embedded in agents.metadata.zootropolis.aliaskit and served via GET /api/companies/:id/agents/:id/identity. Maps to ZOOTROPOLIS_USE_REAL_ALIASKIT.
